misc.title: ONE PIECE HEROINES Anime: Watch the brand-new trailer! “ONE PIECE HEROINES”, an anime highlighting a different kind of story centered on the heroines of ONE PIECE, will be airing in Japan on July 5th,
misc.text: ONE PIECE HEROINES Anime: Watch the brand-new trailer! “ONE PIECE HEROINES”, an anime highlighting a different kind of story centered on the heroines of ONE PIECE, will be airing in Japan on July 5th, 2026, at 11:15 PM (JST). Based on the novel series ONE PIECE novel HEROINES, originally featured in ONE PIECE magazine, the episode “Episode: NAMI” is being adapted into anime form. ◆ Staff Director: Haruka Kamatani (Looking for Magical Doremi, ONE PIECE in LOVE) Character Design: Takashi Kojima (The Colors Within, MONSTERS: 103 Mercies Dragon Damnation) Screenplay: Momoka Toyoda (ONE PIECE FAN LETTER, ONE PIECE LOG: FISH-MAN ISLAND SAGA) ◆ Release ONE PIECE HEROINES will be released in Japan on July 5, 2026, at 11:15 p.m. #ONEPIECE #ONEPIECEHEROINES #Nami #ToeiAnimation Video

items.text: ONE PIECE HEROINES Anime: Watch the brand-new trailer! “ONE PIECE HEROINES”, an anime highlighting a different kind of story centered on the heroines of ONE PIECE, will be airing in Japan on July 5th, 2026, at 11:15 PM (JST). Based on the novel series ONE PIECE novel HEROINES, originally featured in ONE PIECE magazine, the episode “Episode: NAMI” is being adapted into anime form. ◆ Staff Director: Haruka Kamatani (Looking for Magical Doremi, ONE PIECE in LOVE) Character Design: Takashi Kojima (The Colors Within, MONSTERS: 103 Mercies Dragon Damnation) Screenplay: Momoka Toyoda (ONE PIECE FAN LETTER, ONE PIECE LOG: FISH-MAN ISLAND SAGA) ◆ Release ONE PIECE HEROINES will be released in Japan on July 5, 2026, at 11:15 p.m. #ONEPIECE #ONEPIECEHEROINES #Nami #ToeiAnimation Video
